form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors four starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (23.12) at this track over 400m. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors four starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (23.12) at this track over 400m. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (23.33) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (23.33) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 388m at Gosford behind Morning Daylight beaten 6 lengths (22.58). Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 14 over 388m at Gosford behind Morning Daylight beaten 6 lengths (22.58). Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped on the heels through the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Hit the frame again last time when third (23.22) at Richmond, making it three minor placings in a row. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame again last time when third (23.22) at Richmond, making it three minor placings in a row. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At first turn contacted the heels and as a consequence fell.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when sixth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when sixth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Suited here and expected to bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the first turn had hind quarters galloped on.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 10 length fifth at this track (23.98) in a Grade 5. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lines up from box 7 for the first time after finishing a 10 length fifth at this track (23.98) in a Grade 5. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 400m in 23.05. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 400m at this track at Grade 5 level. Major threat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back at this track over 400m in 23.05. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 400m at this track at Grade 5 level. Major threat on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped several times in the front straight.
